case_title: PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. XU YAYI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INABILITY OF PLAINTIFF TO FILE ACTION IN SMALL CLAIM COURT PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 15011065) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY
